tagline: Three Ways to Glow. One Refined Experience.

hero.headline:
Your Most Radiant Glow Starts
Right Here
hero.subheadline: Looking sun-kissed shouldn't mean guesswork or streaky results. Soleil Tans delivers flawless, natural color through premium UV, spray, and spa services — so you walk in and walk out glowing.
checkmarks: Love it or we make it right

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Sun, Spray & Spa —<br class="hidden md:block"> Your Complete Glow Destination
services.subtitle: Stop settling for inconsistent color and impersonal salons. From UV beds to custom airbrush to full-body wellness, Soleil Tans delivers a refined experience under one roof.

cards.title: Premium UV Tanning
cards.description: State-of-the-art beds with fresh bulbs and adjustable intensity. Certified consultants customize every session for your skin type and desired color.

cards.title: Custom Spray Tanning
cards.description: Precision airbrush application with tailored finishes for a flawless, streak-free glow. No UV exposure — just natural-looking color in minutes.

cards.title: Spa & Wellness Treatments
cards.description: Restorative body treatments designed to complement your tanning routine. Total rejuvenation that leaves you looking and feeling your absolute best.

cards.title: Membership Programs
cards.description: Unlimited tanning, priority booking, referral rewards, and exclusive member perks. Flexible plans that fit your lifestyle and budget.

cards.title: Event & Bridal Packages
cards.description: Special occasion packages for weddings, proms, and milestone events. Coordinated sessions so your entire group looks radiant on the big day.

cards.title: Skin Care Products
cards.description: Curated tanning accelerators, moisturizers, and aftercare products recommended by our certified consultants to extend and enhance your glow.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Glow

steps.title: Book Your Free Session
steps.description: Call or book online. New guests receive a complimentary first session — no obligation, no pressure. We will find the perfect service for your skin type.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Consultation
steps.description: Our certified tanning consultants assess your skin tone, goals, and preferences. Every session is personalized — never a one-size-fits-all approach.

steps.title: Walk Out Glowing
steps.description: Enjoy consistent, natural-looking color in an immaculately maintained facility. If you are not completely satisfied, we will make it right — guaranteed.

about.label: Why Guests Trust Soleil Tans
about.headline: Not Just a Tanning Salon — Your Personal Sun Spa
about.description: Since 2003, Soleil Tans Sun Spa has completed over 100,000 sessions for guests across New Jersey and the New York metro area. Our certified consultants, state-of-the-art equipment, and immaculately maintained facilities have made us the region's most trusted name in tanning. We do not just deliver color — we deliver an experience worth coming back for.

features.title: Certified Tanning Consultants
features.description: Every team member is trained and certified to match services to your skin type, ensuring safe, beautiful results every visit.

features.title: Immaculate Facilities, Always
features.description: Guests consistently praise our spotless salons. Every bed, booth, and treatment room is sanitized between sessions — no exceptions.

features.title: Love It or We Make It Right
features.description: Our satisfaction guarantee means if your experience falls short of expectations, we will fix it. That is a promise we have kept for 23 years.

pricing.headline: Simple Pricing. Premium Experience.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your glow goals. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our "Love Your Glow" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any session at Soleil Tans, let us know and we will make it right — no questions asked. We have upheld this promise for over two decades and 100,000 sessions because your confidence in your glow is everything to us.

faqs.question: What should I expect during my first visit?
faqs.answer: Your first visit includes a complimentary consultation with a certified tanning consultant who will assess your skin type, discuss your goals, and recommend the ideal service. Your first session is free with no obligation to continue.

faqs.question: How is spray tanning different from UV tanning?
faqs.answer: Spray tanning uses a customized solution applied by airbrush for instant, UV-free color that develops over a few hours. UV tanning uses controlled light exposure for a gradual, buildable tan. Our consultants can help you choose the best option.

faqs.question: Are your tanning beds safe and well-maintained?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use state-of-the-art equipment with regularly replaced bulbs, and every bed is thoroughly sanitized between sessions. Our certified consultants also customize exposure times based on your individual skin type.

faqs.question: Do you offer memberships or packages?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer flexible membership programs with unlimited tanning, referral rewards, priority booking, and exclusive perks. No long-term contracts — upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

faqs.question: What if I am not happy with my results?
faqs.answer: Our satisfaction guarantee has your back. If you are not completely satisfied with any session, let us know and we will make it right at no additional charge. We have honored this promise for over 23 years.

testimonials.name: Cait F.
testimonials.text: I have been coming to Soleil for years, and have not had one bad experience. The place is always immaculate, and the service is wonderful. The staff is always friendly and helpful in making sure you get the best experience.

testimonials.name: Danielle V.
testimonials.text: The service here is top notch especially Taylor who works at the Matawan Store. The salon is always immaculate and the bulbs in the beds are amazing.

testimonials.name: Luanne P.
testimonials.text: The tanning booth is the best ever — better than a private technician. The color is natural and the whole experience is first-class.
